title: Beautiful Sky
writer: Robert Quigley, Íñigo de Martino, Emilio Fernández
actors: Arturo de Córdova, Lupita Gallardo, Pepe Ortiz
plot: In Mexico, during the early days of the 20th century, two young revolutionaries who are best friends fall in love with the same woman, and both willing to die in a dangerous mission to let his pal marry the girl.
